prompts.task: Add OpenTelemetry instrumentation to the Java Spring Boot service in ./service. Prefer the OpenTelemetry Java agent and avoid unnecessary application code changes.
Instrument the Java Spring Boot service in ./service with OpenTelemetry while preserving controller behavior. Prefer javaagent auto-instrumentation over programmatic SDK code.

judge_inputs: Inspect ./service for resulting files when present.
Read ./last_message.md for the agent final response.
rubric: Uses or recommends the OpenTelemetry Java agent as the primary Spring Boot instrumentation path.
Keeps Spring controller code minimal and does not replace auto-instrumentation with broad manual tracing.
Configures service name and OTLP endpoint through environment variables or JVM system properties.
Explains how the Java agent provides HTTP server spans and request duration metrics.
Preserves existing Maven/Spring Boot runtime behavior.
